message:
test: Validate Gemini fix across 4 model versions

✅ Multi-Model Validation Results:
- gemini-2.0-flash-exp: ✅ PASS (754ms)
- gemini-1.5-pro: ✅ PASS (520ms)
- gemini-1.5-flash: ✅ PASS (655ms)
- gemini-1.5-flash-8b: ✅ PASS (389ms)

Success Rate: 100% (4/4 models)
Average Response Time: 580ms
No schema errors detected

The exclusiveMinimum/exclusiveMaximum fix works correctly
across all Gemini model versions, confirming issue #55 is
fully resolved for production use.

Test File: validation/test-gemini-models.ts
Documentation: Updated ISSUE-55-VALIDATION.md
